name: COUSINS PROPERTIES INC
summary: PART I Corporate Profile Cousins Properties Incorporated (the Registrant or Cousins), a Georgia corporation, is a fully integrated, self-administered, and self-managed real estate investment trust (REIT). Cousins conducts substantially all of its business through Cousins Properties LP ("CPLP"). Cousins owns in excess of 99% of CPLP and consolidates CPLP.
